memoryArtifacts.headline: Dacre – Nine Generations – Bios – Members of the Royal Court

memoryArtifacts.description:
Arms of Dacre: Gules, three escallops argent
Born	ca. 1290
Died	1339
Noble family	Dacre
Spouse(s)	Margaret de Multon, 2nd Baroness Multon of Gilsland
Issue
William Dacre
Thomas Dacre
Ralph Dacre
Hugh Dacre
Father	William Dacre
Mother	Joan Gernet

popularStory.headline: Sir Randolf de Dacre (1290 – 20 April 1339)
popularStory.description:
Sir Randolf de Dacre was the son and heir of Sir William de Dacre and his wife Joan Gernet. 

He was pardoned, 16 Oct 1313, for any part he may have taken in the death of Piers Gavaston. At the time o …

zh.Lanercost Priory, Lanercost, Cumberland,: 英國英格蘭波藍德萊納爾可斯特聖 瑪麗 馬格達萊也斯 邱奇
zh.lifeSummary: Ranulph Dacre是Sir William Dacre和Joan Gernet的兒子，於大約1291年出生在英國波藍德達可。他於1315年之前與Margaret Multon在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他於1336年登記服兵役。他於1331年在英國波藍德被列為high sheriff of cumberland 。他去世於1339年4月在英國英格蘭波藍德享年49歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭波藍德萊納爾可斯特聖 瑪麗 馬格達萊也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Ranulph Dacre是Sir William Dacre和Joan Gernet的儿子，于大约1291年出生在英国波藍德達可。他于1315年之前与Margaret Multon在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他于1336年登记服兵役。他于1331年在英国波藍德被列为high sheriff of cumberland 。他去世于1339年4月在英国英格兰波藍德享年49岁，埋葬在英国英格兰波藍德萊納爾可斯特聖 瑪麗 馬格達萊也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Dacre
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from either of two places called Dacre, one in Cumbria, the other in Yorkshire.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: Ranulph Dacre was born about 1291, in Dacre, Cumberland, England as the son of Sir William Dacre and Joan Gernet. He married Margaret Multon before 1315, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He registered for military service in 1336. In 1331, at the age of 41, his occupation is listed as high sheriff of cumberland  in Cumberland, England. He died in April 1339, in Cumberland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 49, and was buried in St Mary Magdalene's Church, Lanercost, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Ranulph Dacre est né environ 1291, à Dacre, Cumberland, Angleterre, fils de Sir William Dacre et Joan Gernet. Il a épousé Margaret Multon avant 1315, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1336. En 1331, à l’âge de 41 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est high sheriff of cumberland  à Cumberland, Angleterre. Il est décédé en avril 1339, à Cumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à St Mary Magdalene's Church, Lanercost, Cumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Lanercost Priory, Lanercost, Cumberland,: St Mary Magdalene's Church, Lanercost, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Ranulph Dacre wurde um 1291 in Dacre, Cumberland, England, als Sohn von Sir William Dacre und Joan Gernet geboren. Er hat vor 1315 in Yorkshire, England Margaret Multon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er hat sich 1336 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1331, als er 41 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als high sheriff of cumberland  in Cumberland, England aufgeführt. Er starb im April 1339 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Cumberland, England, United Kingdom und wurde in St Mary Magdalene's Church, Lanercost, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Ranulph Dacre è nato il circa 1291 nel Dacre, Cumberland, England come figlio di Sir William Dacre e Joan Gernet. Lui sposato Margaret Multon prima del 1315, nel Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1336. Nel 1331, all'età di 41 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come high sheriff of cumberland  nel Cumberland, England. Morì nel aprile 1339, nel Cumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolto a St Mary Magdalene's Church, Lanercost, Cumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Ranulph Dacreは約1291年にイギリスクウンバーランドダクアでSir William DacreとJoan Gernetの息子として生まれた。1315年以前にイギリスヨークシュアイアでMargaret Multonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1336年に兵役登録をした。1331年，41歳の時，イギリスクウンバーランドでの職業はhigh sheriff of cumberland と記録されている。彼は1339年4月にイギリスイギリスクウンバーランドで49歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスクウンバーランドランエルコストスト マリー マグダリーネ'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.Lanercost Priory, Lanercost, Cumberland,: 영국 잉글랜드 쿠벌랜드 랜르코스트 스트 메리 막그다렌'스 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: Ranulph Dacre(은)는 대략 1291년 영국 쿠벌랜드 다크르에서 Sir William Dacre(와)과 Joan Gernet의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1315년 이전 영국 요르크실르에서 Margaret Multon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1336년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1331년, 41세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 쿠벌랜드에서 high sheriff of cumberland 이었다. 그는 1339년 4월 영국 잉글랜드 쿠벌랜드에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 쿠벌랜드 랜르코스트 스트 메리 막그다렌'스 처르치에 묻혔다.

pt.Lanercost Priory, Lanercost, Cumberland,: St Mary Magdalene's Church, Lanercost, Cumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Ranulph Dacre nasceu aproximadamente 1291, em Dacre, Cumberland, Inglaterra filho de Sir William Dacre e Joan Gernet. Ele casou-se com Margaret Multon antes 1315, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1336. Em 1331, com 41 anos, sua profissão aparece como high sheriff of cumberland  em Cumberland, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em abril de 1339, em Cumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 49 anos, e foi sepultado em St Mary Magdalene's Church, Lanercost, Cumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ro.Lanercost Priory, Lanercost, Cumberland,: St Mary Magdalene's Church, Lanercost, Cumberland, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.Lanercost Priory, Lanercost, Cumberland,: ст мэри магдеилине'с чурч, ланиркост, кумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Ranulph Dacre родился около 1291 г. в местности дакр, кумбирланд, Англия. Его родителей звали Sir William Dacre и Joan Gernet. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Multon перед 1315 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. В 1336 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1331 году, в возрасте 41 год, работал по профессии high sheriff of cumberland  в местности кумбирланд, Англия. Он умер апрель 1339 г. в местности кумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности ст мэри магдеилине'с чурч, ланиркост, кумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания.

es.Lanercost Priory, Lanercost, Cumberland,: St Mary Magdalene's Church, Lanercost, Cumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Ranulph Dacre nació aproximadamente 1291, en Dacre, Cumberland, Inglaterra como hijo de Sir William Dacre y Joan Gernet. Se casó con Margaret Multon antes de 1315, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1336. En 1331, a la edad de 41 años, su ocupación registrada era high sheriff of cumberland  en Cumberland, Inglaterra. Murió en abril de 1339, en Cumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultado en St Mary Magdalene's Church, Lanercost, Cumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
